title: Odyssey Oled G9 G93Sc 49 Inch 240Hz Curved Dual Qhd Ls49Cg934Smxue
features: A new era of OLED gaming

​Feel the difference of Samsung OLED. A brighter screen delivers more colors, shades and contrast for a more brilliant picture at all times, powered by Quantum Dot technology. Vibrant vistas will come to life in whole new ways.
Lose yourself in super ultrawide vistas

Immense worlds envelop you through a super ultrawide display. A screen as wide as two quad high definition monitors delivers maximum space to take in all the pin-sharp detail. It wraps around your field of vision with 1800R curvature to put you fully into your character's shoes.
Sharper visuals with densely packed pixels

Don't sacrifice detail, even with a larger screen. More pixels per inch gives you the level of clarity you need to pick up on the small, but significant, details across the 49" Odyssey OLED G9 screen.
See into the shadows with purer black levels
Uncover every secret with infinite expression. See true black and dark colors on screen without pixel light bleed for supreme color and depth expression in every game.

Dodge, counter and engage faster than the rest. OLED technology delivers near instant reaction time with 0.03ms response time(GtG). HDMI 2.1 and DisplayPort connections keep you ahead of the competition with the 240Hz refresh rate. Milliseconds matter when you face the best.
Immerse in smooth action without disruption

Hyper action made seamless. G-Sync compatibility keeps the GPU and panel synced up to eliminate choppiness, screen-lag, and image tears. Fast-action and complex game scenes are stable and stutter-free with AMD FreeSync Premium Pro for your competitive edge.
